Two apple trees, one taller than the other, on right-of-way side of fence between Rimrock Road and Fitchburg's Rimrock Park. Candidates for pruming/restoration. Location shown here might not be perfect. Trees clearly visible on west side of Rimrock Road.

A line of Elderberry bushes, along MM between Oregon Rd and Nine Springs Creek.

Flowers Late May/Early June; Fruit ripe mid/late August. Access:
